description: Implement Customer Feedback system, Stock/Inventory Management, Business Customization settings, and Multi-Channel configuration pages. This completes all core features of the Si-Admin dashboard.
steps: Create src/app/(dashboard)/feedback/page.tsx - Feedback management page with: feedback history table (customer, content, rating, date, channel), 'Kirim Feedback' button opening a dialog, template library section. Include star rating display and filter by rating.

Create src/app/(dashboard)/feedback/components/FeedbackForm.tsx - Dialog form for sending feedback. Fields: customer (select), content (textarea with template insertion), rating (1-5 stars interactive), conversation reference (optional).

Create src/app/(dashboard)/feedback/components/FeedbackTemplates.tsx - Component showing available templates as cards. Click to select/insert into feedback form. Include add/edit/delete template functionality.
Create src/app/api/feedback/route.ts - API routes for feedback CRUD. GET with filters, POST to create feedback entry.
Create src/app/api/feedback/templates/route.ts - API routes for feedback template CRUD.

Create src/app/(dashboard)/stok/page.tsx - Stock management page with: overview cards (Total Item, Stok Rendah, Perlu Restok, Pergerakan Hari Ini), stock items table with search and category filter, low-stock alerts panel, 'Tambah Stok' and 'Terima Barang' action buttons.

Create src/app/(dashboard)/stok/components/StockTable.tsx - Table component showing all stock items with columns: nama, SKU, kategori, jumlah (with color coding: red if below threshold, yellow if near threshold), satuan, harga, terakhir restok. Include sort and search.
Create src/app/(dashboard)/stok/components/StockForm.tsx - Dialog form for adding new stock items. Fields: nama, SKU, kategori (select), jumlah awal, satuan, harga, batas minimum.

Create src/app/(dashboard)/stok/components/StockReceive.tsx - Dialog form for receiving stock (penerimaan barang). Fields: item (select), jumlah diterima, catatan. Creates a StockMovement record with type IN and updates item quantity.
Create src/app/(dashboard)/stok/components/StockMovementHistory.tsx - Table/timeline showing recent stock movements (masuk/keluar) with item name, quantity, type badge, notes, and date.
Create src/app/(dashboard)/stok/components/LowStockAlerts.tsx - Alert cards showing items below or near their minimum threshold, with suggested restock quantities.
Create src/app/api/stok/route.ts - API routes for stock items CRUD. GET with search/category filters, POST to create.
Create src/app/api/stok/[id]/route.ts - API route for individual stock item update/delete.
Create src/app/api/stok/movement/route.ts - API route for recording stock movements (both IN and OUT). Auto-updates the stock item quantity.

Create src/app/(dashboard)/pengaturan/page.tsx - Settings page with tabs: Profil Bisnis, Channel, Kustomisasi. Profil Bisnis tab: business name, type (dropdown: Retail, F&B, Jasa, Grosir, Lainnya), description, logo upload placeholder. Channel tab: list of configured channels with toggle on/off, add new channel form. Kustomisasi tab: product category management, custom fields placeholder.
Create src/app/(dashboard)/pengaturan/components/BusinessProfileForm.tsx - Form for editing business profile. Fields: nama bisnis, jenis usaha (select with options), deskripsi, pengaturan khusus.

Create src/app/(dashboard)/pengaturan/components/ChannelManager.tsx - Component showing configured channels as cards with: channel name, type icon, active/inactive toggle, configuration details, delete button. Include 'Tambah Channel' button with form for channel type, name, and config.
Create src/app/(dashboard)/pengaturan/components/CategoryManager.tsx - Component for managing stock/product categories. List with add/edit/delete functionality.
Create src/app/api/pengaturan/route.ts - API routes for business profile CRUD.
Create src/app/api/pengaturan/channels/route.ts - API routes for channel management CRUD.
Create src/app/api/pengaturan/categories/route.ts - API routes for category management CRUD.
Verify all pages compile and the full application builds: 'npm run build'.
acceptance_criteria: Feedback page displays feedback history with ratings and allows sending new feedback
Feedback templates can be viewed, created, and used when composing feedback
Stock page shows inventory with color-coded quantity levels
Stock items can be added, received (penerimaan), and movements are tracked
Low-stock alerts display items below minimum threshold
Settings page allows editing business profile including business type
Channels can be added, toggled on/off, and removed from settings
Stock categories can be managed from settings
All UI text is in Bahasa Indonesia
npm run build completes without errors
